title: UPSTART - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CENTRAL OREGON UPSTART Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An online kindergarten readiness program. Offered in-home 20 minutes per day, 5 days per week. Parent coaching and support, Chromebook, and connections to school readiness resources included. Internet support provided if needed. 2362 Glacier Place Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Child must be entering kindergarten within the next year Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 693-5769 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 693-5769 Gelsyn Hernandez [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties, and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
